nonBlockingIssues.description: Minor double-click race condition: disabled state is read from closure rather than ref, so two rapid clicks could both pass the guard before React re-renders. Impact is minimal (worst case: two clipboard writes).
Timeout in resetAfterDelay is not cleaned up on component unmount. No-op in React 18+ but slightly wasteful.
11px text on 320px viewports is at the lower boundary of readability for long bingo item labels. Meets stated requirement but could be bumped to 12px for improved readability.

appliedUpdates.description: Added ShareButton.tsx to UI Components list with description of its functionality (clipboard copy, Web Share API fallback, visual feedback).
Added 'Responsive Design Strategy' section documenting the mobile-first + sm: (640px) breakpoint pattern used across all components.
Added 'TanStack Start Route head() Behavior' section documenting that child route head() merges with (not replaces) root route head().
Updated UI Components descriptions to include accessibility details (role, aria attributes, reduced-motion support).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit rule that workers MUST commit all their changes (including new files) before handing off. The share-button worker left ShareButton.tsx untracked, and the files were only committed by the subsequent SEO worker.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: share-button feature: ShareButton.tsx and ShareButton.test.tsx were left as untracked files. The handoff commitId '2b0e2daa' does not exist in the repo. Files first appear in commit 63f9996 (SEO feature).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The frontend-worker skill should account for verification-only scenarios where existing code already meets requirements and no code changes or new tests are needed. The responsive-design worker correctly skipped implementation but the skill procedure assumes code changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: responsive-design feature: Worker found no code changes needed, correctly verified via Playwright browser automation instead. Skill procedure says 'Write Tests First (Red)' which doesn't apply to verification-only tasks.

rejectedObservations.observation: No skill files found at .factory/skills/ despite workers reporting they used skills.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a factory infrastructure issue (skills may be built-in rather than file-based). Not actionable by the project team.

rejectedObservations.observation: ShareButton.tsx and ShareButton.test.tsx were committed as part of the SEO feature rather than the share-button feature.
rejectedObservations.reason: Attribution trivia. Already captured in the share-button review. No action needed beyond the AGENTS.md suggestion to enforce commit-before-handoff.
